## Summary

## Verification
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` (if gameplay/UI impacted)
- [ ] Backend tests (if backend impacted)

## Qodo
- [ ] Checked Qodo bot feedback and addressed actionable items

## Security
- [ ] No secrets/PII in logs, artifacts, or committed files
- [ ] No `.beads/` tracked
